name: Parallax Services
notes:
We operate on-site network equipment at the following facilities:

**DFW1** - Databank DFW1 (400 S Akard St, Dallas)

**DFW2** - Equinix DA1 (1950 N Stemmons Fwy, Dallas)

**DFW3** -  Evocative DAL6 (1221 Coit Rd, Plano)

These locations serve as our primary interconnection hubs.

Networks located in Equinix DA2, Equinix DA3, Equinix DA6, or Equinix DA11 can reach our equipment in Equinix DA1 via an **Equinix Campus Cross Connect**.

Additional listed **Interconnection Facilities** are reachable via partner-provided wavelength transport.

If you are located in a facility where we do not have on-site equipment or an established wavelength partner, you may still interconnect by delivering your own wavelength or dark fiber circuit to one of our on-site equipment hubs listed above.

Please note that third-party wavelength or dark fiber circuits must terminate at our on-site equipment hubs. We do not currently support third-party transport extensions into other facilities.

Please view our **Contact Information** section for POC's to our **9AM-5PM CST Sales Team**, **24x7 NOC Service Team**, and **24x7 Support Team**.
